creator: ruben@rubenkerkhof.com
text:
(In reply to Krzysztof from comment #1)

I see you've added the patch for 5.5.1 in https://bugs.freebsd.org/206660.

I'm sorry, but I don't understand your last question.
Your own words were "add patch for zfs_arc.c to disable kstat.zfs.misc.arcstats.stolen"
Why do you think this is a mistake?

I think the idea is right, but for some reason it doesn't work with a binary collectd pkg installed on 10.3.
